panels.title: Latest block
panels.description: Head block per deployment, polled via starknet_blockNumber by the monitoring stack's starknet-exporter (katana in sequencer mode exposes no head-block metric).
Total storage capacity of the database
panels.title: Total Size

panels.description: The total amount of L1 gas that has been processed
panels.title: L1 Gas Processed

panels.description: The total amount of Cairo steps that has been processed
panels.title: Cairo Steps Processed

panels.description: Usage percentage of the disk where the node data directory is stored at.
panels.title: Disk Usage

panels.description: Time spent generating a proof for a batch (attestation build + proving), by proof type. The dominant cost of settlement.
panels.title: Proof Generation Duration

panels.description: End-to-end time to settle a batch (prove + submit), by proof type. The gap over proof time is submission overhead.
panels.title: Settle Batch Duration

panels.description: Time to submit the update_state transaction to the Piltover core contract and wait for it to land.
panels.title: State Update Latency

panels.description: Number of blocks in each settled batch. Small values mean idle-flushing; full values mean the backlog is driving batching.
panels.title: Blocks per Batch

panels.description: Blocks and batches successfully settled per second.
panels.title: Settlement Throughput

panels.description: Rate of failed settlement attempts (each triggers a backoff + retry).
panels.title: Settlement Failures

panels.description: Last block number successfully settled to the core contract.
panels.title: Settled Block

panels.description: RISC-V cycles executed to generate each SP1 settlement proof (prover-network only).
panels.title: Proof Cycles

panels.description: Prover-network gas (PGU) billed per SP1 settlement proof (prover-network only).
panels.title: Proof Gas Used

panels.description: Per-settlement SP1 proof fee in PROVE (gas used x gas price), one line per deployment.
panels.title: Proof Fee (PROVE)
